name: Abdullah Al-Faruq
bio: Met during madrasa studies. Comes from a family known for Islamic scholarship and community leadership.

name: Ayesha Siddiqua
bio: Studied Islamic history together at university. Her family traces lineage to early Muslim scholars.

name: Omar ibn Rashid
bio: Work colleague who often shares stories about his ancestors being involved in Islamic education.

name: Fatimah Zahra Noor
bio: Family friend whose lineage is connected to the Prophet’s family traditions and values.

name: Yusuf Al-Hanafi
bio: Met at a mosque study circle. His family follows a long tradition of Islamic jurisprudence.

name: Maryam Khadijah
bio: Known since school days. Actively involved in Islamic charity inspired by her family's legacy.

name: Hasan Al-Qureshi
bio: Business mentor whose family claims descent from the Qureshi tribe with strong Islamic roots.

name: Zainab Binte Ali
bio: Connected through Islamic lectures online. Shares content inspired by early Muslim figures.
